summary: The diff shows that the travelogue fetch hook in useQueries.ts was updated to use journeyId as the lookup key (confirmed by the frontend-file-summaries.txt description: 'travelogue (now fetched by journeyId)'). The change appears confined to the fetch/read path. Other modified files (AdminPanel, CityAlbumManager, LocationInfoDialog, TravelSpotManager, WebsiteLayoutPanel, LocationMapExplorer) appear to have been changed for unrelated bug fixes rather than travelogue logic, which may conflict with the constraint that no other frontend components, panels, layouts, or styles are altered.

hallucinated_features.description: Modifications to AdminPanel.tsx (removed invalid onDayMouseDown prop, replaced drag-select with standard onSelect range picking)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states no changes to any unrelated UI layouts, panels, components, or styles. AdminPanel changes are unrelated to the travelogue fetch path.
